articles.author: Amanda Silberling
articles.title: Google updates AI search to include quotes from Reddit and other sources - TechCrunch
articles.description: While citing web forums and discussion boards can help users find answers to more niche queries, this design choice could also prove chaotic.
articles.content: Google is updating search to refine its AI experience by adding additional context to links, like excerpts from web forums and blogs, as well as a feature that highlights links from a user’s news sub… [+2679 chars]
